Società Filarmonica di Turriaco

Over 150 years of musical tradition in the heart of the Isonzo region

One of the wind bands with the richest history in the entire Friuli Venezia Giulia region, witness to the transformation of the Isonzo lands and an exceptional link between Central European culture and the Italian musical tradition.

The Society The Band Our Courses Upcoming Events Our History Gallery Contact
𝄞

Società Filarmonica di Turriaco

Founded in 1870, the Società Filarmonica di Turriaco is one of the most traditional wind bands in Friuli Venezia Giulia. Member of ANBIMA FVG.
